displayTitle: Tales of the Jedi: The Sith War #4: Jedi Holocaust
synopsis:
Following the disastrous raid on Coruscant, Ulic Qel-Droma, Exar Kun, and Mandalore return to Yavin 4, where Ulic learns from Mandalore that Aleema Keto betrayed him. Concealing his anger, Ulic grants Aleema the "honor" of leading the next attack, secretly intending to let her manipulations destroy her.

Meanwhile, Kun's corrupted Jedi acolytes move to murder their own masters across the galaxy. On Ambria, Nomi Sunrider, her daughter Vima, and Sylvar visit Master Thon, only to be ambushed by Crado and the Sith-possessed Oss Wilum, who summons dark side Hssiss. The Jedi fight them off, Nomi using battle meditation to defeat the beasts, and Sylvar scars the fleeing Crado. Elsewhere the acolytes succeed in slaying eight Jedi Masters, alerting the surviving Jedi at the Great Library of Ossus to the scale of the threat.

To draw the Republic fleet away from Ossus, Kun sends Aleema and Crado to attack Kemplex Nine aboard Naga Sadow's warship *Corsair*. Using its crystals, Aleema tears the core from a star in the Cron Cluster and hurls it at the pursuing Jedi, incinerating them, but the blast triggers a chain reaction that detonates all ten stars. Aleema and Crado are killed in the Cron Supernova, and with Ossus left defenseless, Ulic and Exar Kun set course to plunder its Great Library.
title: Tales of the Jedi: The Sith War #4: Jedi Holocaust
